NOTES: Supported post data: post_title, post_name, post_excerpt, post_status. Also supports meta and taxonomies.
Taxonomies can be either the title or the ID of the taxonomy. Term names may actually work as well but they would look odd when creating missing terms

meta.rank_math_description: Use Advanced Forms for ACF to save and pre-fill ACF fields stored against an options page.

meta.rank_math_title: Enforce a unique field value for each Advanced Forms entry
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/before_submission to block duplicate values — e.g. one entry per email address — and surface a friendly error to the user.

How-to-trigger-a-form-to-save-via-AJAX-a.post_title: How to trigger a form to save via AJAX as the form is updated

meta.rank_math_title: Auto-save an Advanced Forms submission via AJAX on every change
meta.rank_math_description: Combine AJAX, filter mode and post editing to update the same post in place without ever showing a success message.

How-to-dynamically-change-a-success-mess.post_title: How to dynamically change a success message when a post is updated

meta.rank_math_title: Dynamically change a form's success message when a post is updated
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/editing/post_updated + af/form/success_message to swap in a custom success message when a form edits an existing post.

How-to-track-data-changes-when-editing-p.post_title: How to track data changes when editing posts or users

How-to-redirect-the-form-submission-afte.post_title: How to redirect the form submission after post creation

meta.rank_math_title: Redirect after a form creates a post — Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Hook into af/form/editing/post_created to send users to a custom URL after a form creates a new post, with the new post's ID in the query string.

How-to-redirect-the-form-submission-afte.post_title: How to redirect the form submission after user creation

meta.rank_math_title: Redirect after a form creates a user — Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Hook into af/form/editing/user_created to send users to a custom URL after a form creates a new user, with the new user's ID in the query string.

How-to-update-a-users-password-from-a-fo.post_title: How to update a user's password from a form field

meta.rank_math_title: Update a user's password from an Advanced Forms field
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/editing/user_updated and wp_set_password() to let users change their own password from an Advanced Forms field.

How-to-assign-taxonomy-terms-to-posts.md.post_title: How to assign taxonomy terms to created/edited posts

meta.rank_math_title: Assign taxonomy terms to created or edited posts
meta.rank_math_description: ACF taxonomy fields don't currently set the terms against the post — bridge the gap with af/form/editing/post_created and wp_set_post_terms().

How-to-set-the-newly-created-user-as-aut.post_title: How to set the newly created user as author of a newly created post

meta.rank_math_title: Set a new user as the author of a new post — Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/editing/post_data to assign the newly created user as the author of a post created in the same form submission.

How-to-prevent-emails-sending-if-form-is.post_title: How to prevent emails sending if form is updating a post

meta.rank_math_title: Prevent email notifications when a form updates an existing post
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/email/recipient to skip notification emails on edit submissions and only send them when a form creates a new post.

How-to-set-the-post-excerpt-when-creatin.post_title: How to set the post excerpt when creating or editing a post

meta.rank_math_title: Set the post excerpt from an Advanced Forms field
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/editing/post_data to populate post_excerpt (or any other post property) from a submitted form field.

How-to-change-a-users-role-on-post-creat.post_title: How to change a user's role on post creation

meta.rank_math_title: Change a user's role after a form creates a post — Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/editing/post_created and wp_update_user() to switch the post author's role after a form submission creates a new post.

How-to-change-a-users-role-on-user-creat.post_title: How to conditionally modify the user role on user creation

meta.rank_math_title: Conditionally set a user's role when an Advanced Forms form creates them
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/editing/user_data and af_get_field() to pick a user role based on submitted form values during user creation.

How-to-change-the-value-of-a-field-durin.post_title: How to change the value of a field during submission based on another value

meta.rank_math_title: Change a field's value during form submission based on another value
meta.rank_math_description: Modify $_POST before Advanced Forms' submission handler runs to override field values based on what was submitted in other fields.

How-to-show-image-previews-when-uploaded.post_title: How to show image previews when uploaded to a form

meta.rank_math_title: Display Advanced Forms entries on the front end
meta.rank_math_description: Query the af_entry custom post type with WP_Query and ACF template functions to render form entries anywhere on your site.

Listing-and-deleting-posts-on-the-front-.post_title: Listing and deleting posts on the front end

How-to-create-multiple-posts-with-a-sing.post_title: How to create multiple posts with a single form submission

Use-a-custom-URL-parameter-to-edit-a-spe.post_title: Use a custom URL parameter to edit a specific post ID

meta.rank_math_title: Edit a specific post via a URL parameter — Advanced Forms for ACF
meta.rank_math_description: Set the form's post arg to 'param' so Advanced Forms reads the target post ID from a query parameter — useful for create-then-edit flows and per-post edit links.

How-to-pre-fill-form-field-values.md.post_title: How to pre-fill form field values

meta.rank_math_title: Pre-fill Advanced Forms field values — values arg + prefill_value filter
meta.rank_math_description: Two ways to pre-fill Advanced Forms fields: pass a values array to advanced_form(), or hook af/field/prefill_value for programmatic per-field control.

How-to-access-the-post-ID-after-a-post-i.post_title: How to access the post ID after a post is created

meta.rank_math_title: Access the new post ID after Advanced Forms creates or updates a post
meta.rank_math_description: Read the created or updated post ID from AF()->submission['post'], plus the dedicated post_created and post_updated hooks for clean per-mode handling.

How-to-enable-all-pages-on-page-load-for.post_title: How to enable all pages on page load for a multi-page form

meta.rank_math_title: Make every page navigable from page load on an Advanced Forms multi-page form
meta.rank_math_description: A short JavaScript snippet that bumps max_page on form setup so every page in a multi-page Advanced Forms form is reachable from page load.

How-to-show-form-entry-data-on-a-thank-y.post_title: How to show form entry data on a 'thank you' page after form submission

meta.rank_math_title: Show a submission summary on the redirect / thank-you page
meta.rank_math_description: Use af_get_field() on the redirect target to render submitted values back to the visitor, with gotchas around trailing-slash redirects and page caching.

How-to-run-custom-JavaScript-immediately.post_title: How to run custom JavaScript immediately before form is submitted

meta.rank_math_title: Run custom JavaScript right before an Advanced Forms submission
meta.rank_math_description: Use af.addSubmissionStep on af/form/setup to intercept Advanced Forms submissions and run custom JavaScript — sync or async — before the request is sent.

How-to-manage-a-users-profile.md.post_title: How to manage a user's profile

meta.rank_math_title: Let users update their own profile with an Advanced Forms form
meta.rank_math_description: Render an Advanced Forms form with user="current" on an account page and submissions update the logged-in user's profile automatically.

How-to-edit-the-post-content-and-post-ti.post_title: How to edit the post content & post title

meta.rank_math_title: Map an Advanced Forms field to a post's title or content
meta.rank_math_description: Use the form's Editing settings (or the af/form/editing/post_data filter) to write submitted values into a post's core title and content fields.

How-to-provide-an-option-to-save-a-post-.post_title: How to provide an option to save a post as a draft

meta.rank_math_title: Let users choose between publish and draft when creating posts via a form
meta.rank_math_description: Add a radio field for the desired status and use af/form/editing/post_data to set post_status to draft or publish on submission.

How-to-append-new-rows-to-an-existing-re.post_title: How to append new rows to an existing repeater field

meta.rank_math_title: Append rows to an existing repeater field on form submission
meta.rank_math_description: Avoid rendering huge repeaters by removing the field from the form's mapping and using ACF's add_row() in a submission handler to append new rows instead.

Dynamically-conditionally-set-a-redirect.post_title: Dynamically / conditionally set a redirect on form submission

meta.rank_math_title: Dynamically set a redirect URL based on submitted values
meta.rank_math_description: Override AF()->submission['args']['redirect'] in af/form/submission to send users to different pages based on what they entered in the form.

How-to-hide-fields-based-on-the-current-.post_title: How to hide fields based on the current user's role

meta.rank_math_title: Hide form fields per-role with af/field/before_render
meta.rank_math_description: Return false from af/field/before_render to drop fields out of the rendered form for users without the required role — they never appear in the DOM.

Adding-custom-email-headers-to-notificat.post_title: Adding custom email headers (CC, BCC, Reply-To) to notification emails

meta.rank_math_title: Add CC, BCC, and Reply-To headers to Advanced Forms notification emails
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/email/headers (or the form-key-suffixed variant) to add custom email headers to a notification email — Reply-To, CC, BCC, or anything wp_mail() accepts.

How-to-assign-the-form-markup-to-a-varia.post_title: How to assign the form markup to a variable

meta.rank_math_title: Capture the form's HTML into a variable instead of echoing it
meta.rank_math_description: Set the echo arg to false on advanced_form() to have it return the form markup as a string — useful when wrapping the form or rendering it through a template engine.

How-to-pre-fill-fields-from-values-in-a-.post_title: How to pre-fill fields from values in a URL query string

meta.rank_math_title: Pre-fill Advanced Forms fields from URL query parameters
meta.rank_math_description: Read $_GET inside af/field/prefill_value to pre-fill a field with a value passed in the URL — handy for personalised links and tracking.

meta.rank_math_title: Persist an Advanced Forms calculated field value into a regular ACF field
meta.rank_math_description: Calculated fields are display-only — use af/form/submission and update_field() to write the calculated value into a stored field on the record being created or edited.

How-to-trigger-a-calculated-field-update.post_title: How to trigger a calculated field update

meta.rank_math_title: Force an Advanced Forms calculated field to recalculate from JavaScript
meta.rank_math_description: Manually trigger a calculated field's AJAX recalculation when ACF's default change events aren't enough — plus warnings on request volume and overlapping responses.

meta.rank_math_title: Pre-fill ACF group field values from af/field/prefill_value
meta.rank_math_description: Group fields need their pre-fill value as an array keyed by sub-field key (not name). Return that shape from af/field/prefill_value to populate group sub-fields.

Dynamically-set-maximum-allowed-rows-on-.post_title: Dynamically set maximum allowed rows on a repeater field on form render

meta.rank_math_title: Set a repeater's max rows dynamically based on a runtime condition
meta.rank_math_description: Patch the field's max setting in af/field/before_render to cap repeater rows based on user role, current data, or any other runtime condition.

How-to-prevent-form-submission-based-on-.post_title: How to prevent form submission based on submitted values

meta.rank_math_title: Block a form submission based on submitted values with a friendly error
meta.rank_math_description: Use af_add_submission_error() inside af/form/before_submission to abort a submission and surface a user-visible error message above the form.

How-to-modify-field-values-sent-in-notif.post_title: How to modify field values sent in notification emails

meta.rank_math_title: Format an ACF field differently in an Advanced Forms notification email
meta.rank_math_description: Register a custom merge tag with af/merge_tags/resolve to format an ACF value differently in an email than its default Return Format would produce.

How-to-store-IP-addresses-on-form-entrie.post_title: How to store IP addresses on form entries

meta.rank_math_title: Store the submitter's IP address on an Advanced Forms entry
meta.rank_math_description: Hook af/form/entry_created and write REMOTE_ADDR to the entry's post meta — plus reverse-proxy header notes and a GDPR compliance reminder.

How-to-send-notification-emails-to-multi.post_title: How to send notification emails to multiple recipients

meta.rank_math_title: Send an Advanced Forms notification to multiple recipients
meta.rank_math_description: Comma-separate recipients in the Custom recipient field, or use af/form/email/recipient for dynamic recipient lists based on form values or the current user.

How-to-override-a-field-placeholder-when.post_title: How to override a field placeholder when rendering an ACF form

meta.rank_math_title: Override an ACF field's placeholder at render time with af/field/before_render
meta.rank_math_description: Patch the field array in af/field/before_render to change a field's placeholder (or any other setting) at render time without editing the field group.

Using-a-calculated-field-to-show-an-aggr.post_title: Using a calculated field to show an aggregate total of a repeater field

meta.rank_math_title: Sum a repeater sub-field into an Advanced Forms calculated field
meta.rank_math_description: Use a PHP-based calculator (af/field/calculate_value/name=…) to walk repeater rows server-side — the only way to aggregate values across rows of a repeater.

How-to-override-the-mail-notification-en.post_title: How to override the mail notification entirely

meta.rank_math_title: Replace Advanced Forms notifications with a fully custom email handler
meta.rank_math_description: Remove the built-in notifications and send your own emails from af/form/submission using wp_mail() — full control when the existing filters aren't enough.

meta.rank_math_title: Dequeue Advanced Forms / ACF scripts via af/form/enqueue
meta.rank_math_description: Dequeue the af-forms-script and acf-input enqueues via af/form/enqueue — with notes on why doing this usually breaks form behaviour.

How-to-send-email-notifications-to-the-c.post_title: How to send email notifications to the current logged-in user

meta.rank_math_title: Send Advanced Forms notifications to the current logged-in user
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/email/recipient with wp_get_current_user() to send a notification to whoever's logged in at submission time.

How-to-modify-the-CSS-for-notification-e.post_title: How to modify the CSS for notification emails

meta.rank_math_title: Customise the CSS used in Advanced Forms email notifications
meta.rank_math_description: Append or replace the inline CSS that styles Advanced Forms notifications using the af/form/email/styles filter — plus tips on email-client compatibility.

How-to-hide-fields-from-the-admin-but-sh.post_title: How to hide fields from the admin but show them on a form

meta.rank_math_title: Hide ACF fields from the admin while keeping them on the form
meta.rank_math_description: Toggle 'Hide from admin?' on a field to keep it visible on Advanced Forms forms but hidden from any admin location rules the field group is attached to.

meta.rank_math_title: Pre-fill ACF clone field values, with and without Prefix Field Names
meta.rank_math_description: Match the rendered field name in af/field/prefill_value depending on whether Prefix Field Names is enabled — the joined name format catches the prefixed case.

How-to-stop-an-email-sending-based-on-su.post_title: How to stop an email sending based on submitted values

meta.rank_math_title: Conditionally suppress an Advanced Forms notification by submitted value
meta.rank_math_description: Return false from af/form/email/recipient to skip a notification email when a submitted field doesn't match the expected value.

How-to-get-the-entry-ID.md.post_title: How to get the entry ID

meta.rank_math_title: Read the created entry's ID from AF()->submission['entry']
meta.rank_math_description: When entry storage is enabled, the created entry's post ID is available on AF()->submission['entry'] — read it in af/form/submission to drive downstream work.

How-to-add-an-opt-in-checkbox-for-MailCh.post_title: How to add an opt-in checkbox for MailChimp

meta.rank_math_title: Per-submission opt-in for the Advanced Forms MailChimp integration
meta.rank_math_description: Override $form['mailchimp'] in af/form/submission based on a true/false field — only sync to MailChimp when the user opts in via a checkbox.

How-to-change-to-next-form-stage-on-ente.post_title: How to change to next form stage on enter

meta.rank_math_title: Make Enter advance to the next stage on a multi-stage form
meta.rank_math_description: Intercept the Enter key on form inputs and click the form's $next_button instead — useful for keyboard-friendly multi-stage forms.

How-to-show-a-notice-above-the-form-when.post_title: How to show a notice above the form when using filter mode

meta.rank_math_title: Show a post-submit confirmation when an Advanced Forms form uses filter mode
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/before_title (and af/form/ajax/submission for AJAX forms) to render a one-time 'changes saved' notice on profile-style filter-mode forms.

How-to-scroll-to-top-of-form-when-changi.post_title: How to scroll to top of form when changing pages

meta.rank_math_title: Smooth-scroll back to the top of a multi-page Advanced Forms form on page change
meta.rank_math_description: Hook af/form/page_changed in JavaScript to scroll the form's container back into view whenever the user moves between pages.

How-to-add-a-character-count-to-Wysiwyg-.post_title: How to add a character count to Wysiwyg fields

meta.rank_math_title: Add a soft character counter to an ACF Wysiwyg field
meta.rank_math_description: Hook acf.addFilter('wysiwyg_tinymce_settings') to inject a character-count display under the TinyMCE toolbar — soft cap, turns red over the limit.

How-to-use-a-Google-Map-field-address-in.post_title: How to use a Google Map field address in emails & success messages

meta.rank_math_title: Render the address from a Google Map field in an email or success message
meta.rank_math_description: Register a custom merge tag that decodes the Google Map field's JSON payload and returns just the address (or any other key — lat/lng, city, postcode, etc.).

How-to-add-attachments-to-a-notification.post_title: How to add attachments to a notification email

meta.rank_math_title: Add file attachments to an Advanced Forms notification email
meta.rank_math_description: Use af/form/email/attachments to append absolute file paths — static files or files uploaded via the form itself via get_attached_file().

How-to-exclude-sub-fields-from-rendering.post_title: How to exclude sub-fields from rendering in a form

meta.rank_math_title: Extend exclude_fields to support sub-fields in repeaters, groups, and flex content
meta.rank_math_description: Advanced Forms' exclude_fields only applies to top-level fields. Add recursive sub-field support with a small mu-plugin that filters acf/load_fields during render.

Hotfix-for-multiple-forms-on-same-page-t.post_title: Hotfix for multiple forms on same page triggering validation across all fields

meta.rank_math_title: Fix ACF 5.11+ cross-form validation bug on pages with multiple Advanced Forms
meta.rank_math_description: ACF 5.11+ runs validation across every form on the page. Patch acf.validation.onClickSubmit with a small hotfix script that scopes validation to the submitting form only.

Issues-when-using-WP_Query-in-the-acf-lo.post_title: Issues when using WP_Query in the acf/load_field filter

meta.rank_math_title: Fix Advanced Forms admin breaking when WP_Query is used in acf/load_field
meta.rank_math_description: Switch from WP_Query to get_posts() inside acf/load_field callbacks to avoid global $post pollution that breaks the Advanced Forms admin form edit screen.

Scripts-and-stylesheets-arent-loaded-whe.post_title: Scripts & stylesheets aren't loaded when a form is rendered via AJAX

meta.rank_math_title: Fix missing scripts and styles when rendering Advanced Forms via AJAX
meta.rank_math_description: Advanced Forms enqueues its assets during normal rendering — when rendering via AJAX, call af_enqueue() so the form's scripts and styles get registered.

What-to-do-when-there-are-JavaScript-err.post_title: What to do when there are JavaScript errors affecting a form

meta.rank_math_title: Diagnose JavaScript errors affecting an Advanced Forms form
meta.rank_math_description: Bisect third-party plugins to find what's interfering with Advanced Forms' scripts — plus the asset names to exclude from optimisation plugins that defer or combine scripts.

Sorry-you-are-not-allowed-to-attach-file.post_title: "Sorry, you are not allowed to attach files to this post" when adding media to a post

meta.rank_math_title: Fix "Not allowed to attach files" error in Advanced Forms
meta.rank_math_description: Users hitting "Sorry, you are not allowed to attach files to this post" when uploading via a form? It's a WordPress capability check — here's how to fix it.

Gallery-field-not-working-for-some-users.post_title: Gallery field not working for some users

meta.rank_math_title: Gallery field not working for some users — Advanced Forms
meta.rank_math_description: If the gallery field doesn't open the media uploader for some users, it's a WordPress capability check. Grant upload_files to the affected roles.

How-to-fix-encoding-issues-with-special-.post_title: How to fix encoding issues with special characters in Apple Mail subject lines

meta.rank_math_title: Fix Apple Mail subject-line encoding issues — Advanced Forms
meta.rank_math_description: Notification subject lines sometimes appear garbled in Apple Mail. Strip the offending characters (commas are a known offender) via the af/form/email/subject filter.
